I don't have access to Azure DevOps MCP tools in this environment. This repository is hosted on GitHub (not Azure DevOps), and there's no Azure DevOps organization configured.

To query Azure DevOps pull requests, I need:
1. The Azure DevOps organization URL (e.g., `https://dev.azure.com/YourOrganization`)
2. The project name
3. Either Azure DevOps MCP tools installed, or Azure CLI DevOps extension configured with credentials

Please provide the Azure DevOps organization and project details, or confirm if Azure DevOps MCP tools are available.
